description: 设计迭代循环：设计 → 开发 → 审核 → 检查是否达标

execute.command: ITER=$(cat .team/iteration-count.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 1); REVIEW=".team/iterations/review-${ITER}.json"; if [ -f "$REVIEW" ]; then REC=$(node -pe "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('$REVIEW','utf8')).recommendation||'continue'"); GAP=$(node -pe "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('$REVIEW','utf8')).gapScore||100"); if [ "$REC" = 'complete' ] || [ "$GAP" -lt 20 ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi; else exit 1; fi
